Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: When Mudslides Threaten Mountain Villages
programme.desc: In the Alps, villages are increasingly threatened by flows of mud and debris. The problem reached new heights in 2025, when the Swiss mountain village of Blatten was nearly completely buried by a huge avalanche.

programme.title: Homo Plasticus - The Plastic Inside Us
programme.desc: All organisms harbor an invisible, omnipresent enemy: plastic. Researchers worldwide have shown that plastic particles can also be detected in humans - in organs and bodily fluids.

programme.title: The Best Of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

programme.title: E413 - Side-Swiped / Quest For The Blue Bananas
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. // Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.title: E714 - Mummy Pig's Book
programme.desc: Mummy Pig has finally finished writing her first book and decides to take it to playgroup to read to the children with unexpected results.

programme.title: E104 - Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: E108 - The Crew Builds A Popcorn Cafe / The Crew Fixes A Slippery Mess
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew switch to cleanup mode when construction on Cafe Carl's new popcorn restaurant pops out of control. // A soapy accident causes slippery mayhem all over Builder Cove. Can the pups clean it up in time for Mayor Greatway's big jump?

programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: E206 - Tickets
programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.title: E228 - Zoe Zebra, The Postman's Daughter
programme.desc: Mr. Zebra the Postman gets help from his daughter Zoe. Zoe has a very special letter for Peppa and George; an invitation to her birthday party. The party is fun, especially as it turns out that Zoe has invited all of Peppa and George's friends.

programme.title: E204 - Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes the children on a trip to the Zoo where they get a tour from the zookeepers; Mr Lion, Mrs Crocodile and Mr Giraffe!

programme.desc: On their second day in Australia the Kangaroo family take the Peppa and Family to the beach where they try surfing for the first time.

programme.title: E9 - Virginia Trioli
programme.desc: Journalist and author Virginia Trioli joins forces with Alice to revitalise the Tuna Mornay while Alice attempts to change Virginia's mind on kale.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the winners of our heats are joined by a wildcard chosen by our judges. Seven talented artists return for the semi-final, each given 4 hours to capture the likeness and spirit of Dr. Karl Kruszelnicki.

programme.title: E2 - New South Wales
programme.desc: Halina starts out in Bowraville, near Coffs Harbour where she discovers a mobile plastic recycling station which transforms plastic waste into multiple resources, creating opportunity for the local Aboriginal Corporation.

programme.title: E73
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Jade Barker in Perth.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the winners of our heats are joined by a wildcard chosen by our judges. Seven talented artists return for the semi-final, each given 4 hours to capture the likeness and spirit of Dr. Karl Kruszelnicki.

programme.title: E2 - New South Wales
programme.desc: Halina starts out in Bowraville, near Coffs Harbour where she discovers a mobile plastic recycling station which transforms plastic waste into multiple resources, creating opportunity for the local Aboriginal Corporation.

programme.title: E74
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: E9 - The Westall Ufo Mystery
programme.desc: In 1966, a Melbourne high school was thrown into chaos when strange objects appeared in the sky. Sixty years on from Australia's biggest UFO sighting, witnesses are still looking for answers about what they saw at Westall.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The ride takes a dramatic turn when Bhaskar totals the support car. With Ridermania just days away, Jess and the team scramble to salvage their journey.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: E104
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Jade Macmillan.

programme.title: E3 - Leave No Man Behind
programme.desc: Bear drops the contestants off in the middle of a bay where they must swim to shore and, in their haste, a team is left behind. Once on the shore, they must navigate waterfalls, where an injury takes the group by storm.

programme.title: E3 - Girona
programme.desc: Jack learns how to cook the old-fashioned, classic British jellied eels dish. Although it was once an extremely popular meal in Britain, will the Spanish locals like it too?

programme.title: E4 - Malmo
programme.desc: Jack is in the vegetarian capital of Northern Europe, Malmo, Sweden. Here, he shares his version of the Welsh Rarebit toastie and a Michelin star chef adds a Nordic twist.

programme.title: E2 - The Last Laugh
programme.desc: After years of getting the raw end of the deal with Scrappy Larry, Robin pulls a prank on his old buddy, but the fun and games end when Claudia’s buyer makes an unexpected request.

programme.title: E2 - Highlights 2
programme.desc: Tensions run high as the celebrities navigate their way through dense jungle down a ravine, and when they eventually reach what will be their camp for the night, a meal of live scorpions is on the menu. The following morning, they bathe in the nearby river - their first wash in three days - but the relief is only short-lived when Bear arrives for the team's first big test - a descent of a 120ft waterfall. At the end of an action-packed day, one more member of the group faces elimination.

programme.title: E3 - Leave No Man Behind
programme.desc: Bear drops the contestants off in the middle of a bay where they must swim to shore and, in their haste, a team is left behind. Once on the shore, they must navigate waterfalls, where an injury takes the group by storm.

programme.title: Flee
programme.desc: FLEE tells the extraordinary true story of a man, Amin, on the verge of marriage which compels him to reveal his hidden past for the first time

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: A bullish Korean cop struggles to contain a turf war between rival Chinese gangs in Seoul’s immigrant neighbourhoods.

programme.title: Little Men
programme.desc: Two friends have their relationship put to the ultimate test when their parents enter a bitter dispute over a dress shop.

programme.title: Little Men
programme.desc: Two friends have their relationship put to the ultimate test when their parents enter a bitter dispute over a dress shop.

programme.title: The Truth
programme.desc: A celebrated veteran actress is reunited with her estranged daughter, after her new memoir reveals family secrets.

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues with Grandma Gecko!
programme.desc: Grandma Gecko is here to help with some epic rescues! The action starts when Weasel's accelerator gets stuck & he can't stop driving! Grandma Gecko & Gecko hop on a motorbike for a high-speed chase to save him. Then, when lots of vehicles get flat tires from nails on the road, Gecko feels the pressure & calls his Grandma to help him speedily change all the tires. From building a wind turbine to saving Blue, Grandma can do it all!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!

His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: Ghazab
programme.desc: Ajay's spirit seeks out his brother, Vijay and asks him to avenge his death. Things do not go as planned and Vijay might face the same fate as Ajay. Release Year: 1982 Director: C. P. Dixit

programme.title: Phillauri
programme.desc: Born under an unlucky star, a young man is first married to a tree to ward off bad luck before marrying his fiancee. His life turns chaotic when a spirit appears, claiming to be his true wife. Release Year: 2017 Director: Anshai Lal Awards: 2018 Nominee Technical Award - Best Post-Production

programme.title: Punjab Ka Singham
programme.desc: DSP Dilsher fights drug abuse in Punjab's youth, clashing with Bhuller, a powerful tycoon with high-level connections.

programme.title: E10 - From Marseille To La Rochelle
programme.desc: From the south to the northwest of France, Anne-Catherine Verwaerde studies the inspirations and styles of the different coasts.

programme.title: Littoral:2025-2026
programme.desc: Littoral, a program meant for those who love the sea, takes you on a trip along Atlantic coastlines, wherever unexpected discoveries, impromptu encounters and intense emotions lead them.

programme.title: E1792
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E24 - Luc Tangorre Case: The Power Of Denial (Part 1)
programme.desc: Everyone saw him as a victim of a miscarriage of justice. In the early 1980s, Luc Tangorre managed to fool France's intellectual elite. Yet his criminal record reveals a serial rapist who claimed more than twenty victims over nearly forty years.

programme.title: Meurtres A Chartres
programme.desc: While a wedding is taking place in Chartres Cathedral, one of the witnesses is found dead in the crypt. The investigation is entrusted to Captains Victoire and Pierre Templard. The husband and wife police team soon realise that the murder is linked to the legend of the mysterious pregnant Virgin.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2):2025-2026
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: E13 - Happy Christmas!
programme.desc: Leon is safe and sound, to Florence and Ricardo's delight. The latter joins Bernard for the meeting with Violette and hopes to persuade her to talk to Leon.

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.desc: Kalijodo is a gang-controlled slum. When a gang leader's brother is killed, the slum erupts into violence and it is up to the new captain to restore order and break the gangs' hold on the district.

programme.desc: Zachary Wester, a sheriff's deputy from Jackson County, Florida, stands accused of planting drugs on unsuspecting motorists during routine traffic stops. He's been charged with over 65 counts.

programme.desc: A frightening assault ends in tragedy when teenagers shoot splat ball guns at two brothers playing a nighttime basketball game. A fight ensues between the youths, leaving a 17-year-old dead at the scene.

Victor Mystery
programme.desc: Max thinks Take Your Child To Work Day is going to be boring, until he comes across alarming evidence that his father is actually a top-secret operative with amazing equipment and powers.

programme.title: Paper Helicopter
programme.desc: Paper planes need a new twist, so grab your scissors and try making this! Whirl show you how to make a spinning helicopter.

programme.title: Unique Space Jobs
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli gets an inside look at some of the coolest jobs in the space industry. From becoming a famous space YouTuber, to smelling items before they go to the International Space Station, these are not your typical careers.

programme.title: Sickness Strikes
programme.desc: Liam is feeling very sick. Can he hold it down long enough to impress the coach with his shooting skills? Ice dancer Ella reveals just how much skating means to her. And disaster strikes for captain Emily when she falls on an already injured shoulder.

programme.title: Finn Comes Aboard
programme.desc: Smiling Finn asks the Nektons for help to stop his father, Captain Hammerhead, from stealing a treasure that will destroy his family.

programme.title: No Time to Waste
programme.desc: Today, the Junior Vets have to look after squealing piglets, get uncomfortably close to a giant horse that is having an internal examination, and do health checks on tiny homeless kittens.

programme.title: A Magic Curve Ball
programme.desc: In so called ‘string art', straight lines are drawn that look like curved lines. In this episode, Eric tries to do the same. What mathematical principles form the basis of string art and will Eric succeed?

programme.title: Tipsy Topsy Wobbling Crane
programme.desc: When a raging river moves the bridge, Darwin and Newts must learn about counterweights so they can build a crane to reach out and retrieve it.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Trip to Korea
programme.desc: Zoe and Alim are surprised to see Milo holding his breath. Did he eat something spicy? No, he's just trying to beat his apnea record. When Zoe wants to try, Milo claims boys are better. Alim takes them to South Korea, where women dive for pearls, and men stay home!

programme.title: Trip to Jordan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo clash over their school show poster-Zoe colors while Milo writes the title. Alim suggests writing from the right, surprising them. In Jordan, they meet Souria preparing a puppet show and learn to write Arabic... from right to left!

programme.title: Superchutes!
programme.desc: Eric makes a parachute that will slow down a falling egg just enough so it doesn't get smashed when it hits the ground. But first he experiments to figure out the best parachute size. He discovers that NASA also use parachutes to drop robotic probes on to the moon.

programme.title: The Mysterious Bleeps and Bloops
programme.desc: When a highly advanced computer is loaned to Ayrton Park Public School, mysterious cyber events begin happening around town and Addison wonders if the occurrences could be part of a world-wide-web... of mystery!

programme.title: My Fair Fico
programme.desc: Team Doki is invited to a dinner party at a palace in Denmark. They're excited to be going to such a fancy affair. Anabella and Gabi worry that Fico might embarrass them with his poor table manners! Doki doesn't think it's a big deal. What are manners for, anyway?

programme.title: Chasing Unicorns
programme.desc: The team is asked to go and check on some radio-tagged wildlife – unicorns to be precise! Everyone wants to know if unicorns are real. They set off to the Canadian Arctic, using a tracking beacon to find the mysterious creatures.

programme.title: Lord and Peasant
programme.desc: Our humble peasant friend Howler can't wait for his next batch of pretzels! However, in the Middle Ages, the feudal system is ruthless, the lord always helping himself to a share of the peasant's yield. And, quite often, all that's left is a few meager crumbs!

programme.title: The Fog Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are filming a class-project documentary about a “typical day in Ayrton Park” – but things quickly become anything but typical when a mysterious fog envelops the entire downtown area.

programme.title: Super Evil Sprinter
programme.desc: DiktaThor designed a hypnotic disk transforming its spectator into evil. He directs it immediately at Sprinter Galore! Leo and Bumble talk to Sprinter's pure heart to demolish the hypnotic disk and overcome DiktaThor's power.

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: The Catalyst
programme.desc: Raign, Joy, and Hulk get thrown in detention and discover a trap door leading to mysterious tunnels. They must work with the school bully - Brett - to solve the riddle before their time is up.

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: When You Need to Wee!
programme.desc: How do you know when you need a wee? The doctors find out in the lab! An optical illusion turns Dr Xand's face green in Mindbenders, and we check back in on the Ouchers.

programme.title: The Fog Mystery

programme.desc: As the Monkeys and guest builder Brian go over schedule on their '34 Ford Coupe, Richard strikes a deal to feature the car in Hot Rod Magazine if it can be done in time.

programme.title: E6 - Street Legal
programme.desc: With an eviction notice hanging over their heads, Rick and the SLAM guys duke it out with Chuck and his out-of-control obsession with a 1970 1/2 Camaro Z28.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E12 - Origami Overload
programme.desc: John has a problem with the origami flamingos he has made and needs Sarah and Duck's help.

programme.title: E24 - Moon
programme.desc: Stan helps his friends to get a closer look at the moon through a telescope, so they can do a show-and-tell.

programme.title: E43 - It's Time For Lunar New Year
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.title: E34 - Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E35 - Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: E40 - The Wedding Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: E3 - Cabbage
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: E2 - Gooseberry
programme.desc: Gooseberry sings a song about everything you have to do to become a Gooseberry Club member

programme.title: E5 - Itchy
programme.desc: Farmer Fuddle's chickens have escaped. Their feathers make Vivienne Volcano very itchy, so Messy has to find a way to scratch her itches and round up the chickens

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E5 - Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: E12 - The Teamwork Badge
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: E12 - Origami Overload
programme.desc: John has a problem with the origami flamingos he has made and needs Sarah and Duck's help.

programme.title: E25 - Delivery
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: E24 - Moon
programme.desc: Stan helps his friends to get a closer look at the moon through a telescope, so they can do a show-and-tell.

programme.title: E43 - It's Time For Lunar New Year
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.title: E34 - Space

programme.title: E3 - Black Tip Sharks
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is taking ten novice divers on one Deadly mission - to dive with sharks in Bimini, the shark capital of the world, with the ultimate goal being to qualify as scuba divers.

programme.title: E4 - Lemon Sharks
programme.desc: Some of the team explores the mangroves, which are essential for the survival of some sharks. While there, they come face to face with baby lemon sharks.

programme.title: E6 - Blowing Up Hollywood
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy go behind-the-scenes at a premier Hollywood special effects company to reveal the secrets of the world's greatest movie explosions.

programme.title: E26 - Dragster Tires; Icing; Floating Docks; Spiral Pipes
programme.desc: On this episode of How It's Made: Dragster Tires; Icing; Floating Docks; Spiral Pipes

programme.title: E2 - The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth.

programme.title: E1 - Fire In The Cockpit
programme.desc: A team of experts investigate if this disaster was a tragic accident or part of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: E3 - I Call Him Monster

programme.desc: It seems an epic battle took place in the cabin and Grizzy is missing, it's a strange case for the Lemmings.

programme.title: E89 - The Bus/The Night/The Misunderstanding/The Roots/The Blame
programme.desc: When Rocky suggests that the Elmore Junior High kids skip school, the bus is boarded by criminals who seem to want to teach them the importance of school attendance. The masked culprits are clearly the children's parents, faking a heist to teach them a lesson. But when the police get involved for real, it becomes clear the parents aren't the ones pulling the strings.

programme.title: E13 - Lion's Share
programme.desc: The SWAT team races to stop a violent rampage with ties to a painful chapter from Hicks' past.

programme.title: E15 - Northern Rexposure
programme.desc: When Jesse's sister contacts him for help, he, Sarah and Rex head to Northern Ontario and find themselves in the middle of a deadly situation.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: E8 - Atonement
programme.desc: Mickey makes a big mistake in her hunt for the killer, but her family helps to right the problem. A major showdown unites the neighborhood but turns deadly.

programme.title: Casino Raider, The Sequel
programme.desc: As a prominent gambler, Ray has encountered many challenges in his career. When Chiang challenges Ray to a gambling contest with him in Macau, Ray's adventures begins again...

programme.title: Security Unlimited
programme.desc: Comedy trio the Hui Brothers' produce and star in this hilarious and off the wall laugh-fest and box-office hit, Security Unlimited. Michael Hui stars as head security guard Chou, whose unorthodox, and at times ridiculous approach to training his subordinates doesn't seem to go down well with his boss, Fan (Stanley Fung). Sam (Sam Hui) and Bruce (Ricky Hui) are Chou's favorite targets of abuse, but Chou soon finds the shoe is on the other foot when Ricky gets promoted after saving the day in a botched bank heist.

programme.title: Security Unlimited
programme.desc: Comedy trio the Hui Brothers' produce and star in this hilarious and off the wall laugh-fest and box-office hit, Security Unlimited. Michael Hui stars as head security guard Chou, whose unorthodox, and at times ridiculous approach to training his subordinates doesn't seem to go down well with his boss, Fan (Stanley Fung). Sam (Sam Hui) and Bruce (Ricky Hui) are Chou's favorite targets of abuse, but Chou soon finds the shoe is on the other foot when Ricky gets promoted after saving the day in a botched bank heist.

programme.title: E218
programme.desc: TOP VIEW: High precision observation of space security and insight into the changes of the global situation. Travel through time and space and perceive the dimension of geography.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.
Chief Editor's Time: Daily key issues around the world are discussed on Chief Editor's Time. In-depth analyses and discussion gives viewers a better understanding of the issue.

programme.title: E997 - Mainland Q&A (IV)
programme.desc: MAINLAND Q&A: Zero-distance from the heavyweights and top leaders is the draw of this program. It reveals striking details about the thoughts of the most influential decision-makers, telling viewers the pulse of the time.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she's ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards' former family home. She's determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: E86
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.desc: 晚會將繼續以劉宇寧、薛之謙、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等頂級唱將陣容點燃期待，以科技舞美賦能全新視聽體驗，繼續以「用奮斗點亮幸福」為主題，一起迎接更好2025。

programme.title: E10 - 戶外闖關選人挑戰
programme.desc: 蘇有朋、薛之謙、王嘉爾、周筆暢、胡彥斌、歐陽娜娜等明星作為音浪召集人，他們將與300位合夥人組成3組音浪團，在24小時內緊急排練，一起完成創意十足的音樂SHOW。

programme.title: E2 - 極挑兄弟勇闖火線
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: 77 Heartbreaks
programme.desc: When Adam and Eva break up after ten years, Adam thinks the breach was caused by one trivial incident, but Eva knows she's already forgiven Adam 77 times! Sweethearts since law school, Adam changed professions to start a Thai boxing studio and gradually became indifferent to Eva. Seemingly petty matters, like forgetting she hates raisin cookies, become the catalyst for her moving out and changing her Facebook status to 'single'. Despondent, Adam has a drunken tryst with his student, Mandy. Adam gains new insight after accidentally discovering Eva's private journal. Entitled '77 Heartbreaks', the title refers to the philosophy that 'forgiving someone 7 times isn't enough; 70 x 7 times is too much; so go ahead and forgive 77 times!' Reading it makes Adam realize his love. But what can he do to win her back? And what secret is contained in the journal's torn-out last page? He rushes to Eva and melts her heart by recounting their happy memories. When Eva tells him Heartbreak #77

programme.title: Broker
programme.desc: 'Sanghyeon' is always struggling from debt, and 'Dongsu' works at a baby box facility. On a rainy night, they steal the baby 'Woosung,' who was left in the baby box, to sell him at a good price. Meanwhile, detectives were watching, and they quietly track them down to capture the crucial evidence.

programme.title: Showbiz Spy
programme.desc: Cercis Lui goes undercover in this lively comedy as an officer of the 'International Association for the Physical and Mental Health Development of Underage Boys and Girls” dedicated to protecting young boys and girls from being exploited in their pursuit of pop stardom. When tasked with taking down a shady talent show and its mastermind, Big Boss, Cercis must disguise himself as a woman to enter the competition. Only then can he get close enough to gather the evidence to take down the criminal ring. Joining this outlandish operation are Helianthus - an entertainment reporter, Circle O – a wannabe popstar, Lilium - a notorious artist and Oval O – cousin of Circle O from the US. But does this ragtag team have what it takes to triumph over the shady side of the business?

programme.title: Four Trails
programme.desc: At the time, they said it couldn't be done. In 2012, Andre Blumberg set off by himself, to run all four of Hong Kong's iconic ultra distance trails in just four days. 298km and over 14,500m of climbing later, one of the hardest ultra marathons in the world - the Hong Kong Four Trails Ultra Challenge - was born. With the 2021 edition of the challenge as the backdrop, 'Four Trails' takes you on a journey from when the concept was first was conceived to it's current format. Under 60 hours to be deemed a 'Finisher' and under 72 hours to be a ‘Survivor', unsupported and with an ever evolving set of rules. It takes a deep dive into the famous four trails that make up the challenge and you will both laugh and cry as the astonishing stories of those who dare attempt such a feat unfold.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment.
